name: feature.campaign-brief.nodes
description: Personas & Campaign Brief node pack (ADR 0156 / ADR 0014) — validate a brief (compute the enabled channel set) and generate the messaging kernel (the shared strategic foundation every channel echoes), grounding it in the knowledge base (kb.rag) + brand voice (ctx.features.brand) via the run-scoped provider. Drives the Campaign Studio orchestration (ADR 0158).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Brief: Validate
nodes.description: Validates a campaign brief's completeness and computes the enabled channel set over ctx.features['campaign-brief']. Inputs: { briefId }. Output: { valid, issues, enabledChannels }.

nodes.label: Brief: Generate Messaging Kernel
nodes.description: Generates the messaging kernel (headline, supporting statement, proof points, CTAs, tone) for a brief — grounded in the KB (kb.rag citations) and the brand voice (ctx.features.brand.resolve-voice), via the run-scoped ctx.callAI — then persists it on the brief. Inputs: { briefId, provider?, model? }. Output: { kernel }.
